parameters.name: rec_trade_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this transaction generated by TapPay server.

parameters.name: auth_code
parameters.description: Authorization code. Supported only for Direct Pay and Token Pay.

parameters.name: bank_transaction_id
parameters.description: Transaction identifier for the bank. Recommended to define unique to avoid error 421.

parameters.name: bank_order_number
parameters.description: Acquirer's returned order number after authorization.

parameters.name: order_number
parameters.description: Self-defined identifier for each transaction. Does not allow null.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Transaction price.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Response code. 0 indicates success.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Error message.

parameters.name: transaction_time_millis
parameters.description: Time when the bank handles the transaction.

parameters.name: transaction_complete_millis
parameters.description: Time when transaction completed (support E.SUN, Cathay Bank).

parameters.name: pay_info
parameters.description: E-payment related information object (see PayInfo schema). Only returned for e-payment transactions.

parameters.name: acquirer
parameters.description: Acquiring banks or payment processors.

parameters.name: e_invoice_carrier
parameters.description: Electronic invoice carrier information. Support: JKOPAY, Plus Pay. Contains type (Int(3): 0 mobile phone barcode, 1 natural person certificate barcode, 2 other carrier barcodes), number (String(100)), donation (Boolean), donation_id (String(50)).

parameters.name: card_identifier
parameters.description: Card identifier; unique per credit card. Supported only for Direct Pay and Token Pay.

parameters.name: bank_result_code
parameters.description: Response code from the bank.

parameters.name: bank_result_msg
parameters.description: Error message from the bank.

parameters.name: merchant_reference_info
parameters.description: Merchant reference information. Contains affiliate_codes (Array). Only Support: Direct Pay, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay.

parameters.name: instalment_info
parameters.description: Returned when use instalment. Only Support: Direct Pay. Contains number_of_instalments, first_payment, each_payment (int), extra_info (JSONObject).

parameters.name: redeem_info
parameters.description: Returned when use redeem and non-3D transaction. Only Support: Direct Pay. Contains used_point, balance, offset_amount, due_amount (String), extra_info (JSONObject).

parameters.name: event_code
parameters.description: Code defined by bank, E-Wallet and merchants. Support: Easy Wallet.

parameters.name: merchandise_details
parameters.description: Item amount or points excluded from redeems. Only supported by some e-payments.

request.description: Server-to-merchant JSON notification sent by TapPay to backend_notify_url after e-payment / Direct Pay 3D transactions

responses.description: Merchant must respond HTTP 200; otherwise TapPay resends at 1/2/4/8/16 minutes, up to five times. Source does not define a response body.

missing: Merchant-hosted URL (https, port 443); path defined by merchant, not TapPay (path=null)
No signature/verification on the callback; TapPay recommends re-querying via Record API
